recovery.name: Odd Morsel
recovery.effect: Slightly restores an ally's HP. May cause side effect.

recovery.name: Rancid Gravy
recovery.effect: Moderately restores an ally's HP. May cause side effect.

recovery.name: Soma
recovery.effect: Fully restores party's HP and SP.

recovery.name: Patra Gem
recovery.effect: Dispels Panic, Fear, and Distress (1 ally).

incenseCards.name: Blank Card
incenseCards.effect: Used at the shrine to duplicate a skill card.
